news.headline: EpilepsyGTx Partners with ClearPoint Neuro to Support Targeted Delivery of Lead Gene Therapy in Epilepsy
news.summary: EpilepsyGTx will use ClearPoint's SmartFlow Cannula and Navigation System to deliver its gene therapy candidate EPY201 in an upcoming first-in-human Phase 1/2a trial for focal refractory epilepsy, expected to start in the UK/Europe by end of 2026.

news.headline: ClearPoint Neuro CEO Burnett Sells $387,600 in Company Shares
news.summary: CEO Joseph Burnett sold 20,000 shares at a weighted average price of $19.38 under a pre-established Rule 10b5-1 trading plan, following exercise of options at $2.50 per share.

news.headline: B. Riley Raises ClearPoint Neuro Price Target to $30.00 from $20.00, Keeps Buy Rating
news.summary: B. Riley Securities analyst Anderson Schock raised his price target on ClearPoint Neuro to $30 from $20 while maintaining a Buy rating, citing continued momentum from the uniQure/AMT-130 regulatory progress and the company's broadening biopharma partnership base.

news.headline: ClearPoint Neuro Stock Surges on Partner uniQure's Favorable FDA Path for Huntington's Gene Therapy
news.summary: CLPT shares jumped roughly 26-32% after partner uniQure said the FDA agreed that 3-year Phase I/II data for AMT-130 (delivered via ClearPoint's navigation platform and SmartFlow cannula) can support a BLA for accelerated approval, with submission planned for Q3 2026.

news.headline: Stifel Reiterates ClearPoint Neuro Buy Rating and $16 Price Target on Neurosurgery Platform Strength
news.summary: Following the biennial American Society for Stereotactic and Functional Neurosurgery meeting, Stifel reiterated its Buy rating and $16 price target, highlighting ClearPoint's neuro ecosystem and more than 60 active biopharma partnerships, including over 10 programs with FDA expedited-review designations.

news.headline: ClearPoint Neuro Enters into 10-Year Focused Ultrasound Development Partnership with Sungkyunkwan University, South Korea
news.summary: ClearPoint agreed to a decade-long R&D collaboration with Sungkyunkwan University's SONOCARELAB after demonstrating blood-brain-barrier tracer delivery in a preclinical model, extending its drug-delivery ecosystem into focused ultrasound.

catalysts.label: Q2 2026 earnings release
catalysts.detail: ClearPoint Neuro is expected to report second-quarter 2026 financial results (TipRanks estimates August 11, 2026, after market close), with the market watching for progress against the $52-56M full-year revenue guidance; as of July 20, 2026 the exact date still has not been formally confirmed by the company via press release.

catalysts.label: uniQure BLA submission for AMT-130 (Huntington's disease)
catalysts.detail: Partner uniQure plans to file a Biologics License Application with the FDA for AMT-130, delivered via ClearPoint's navigation platform and SmartFlow cannula, using 3-year Phase I/II data following supportive Type B FDA meeting feedback; uniQure expects official meeting minutes and continues finalizing confirmatory-trial design ahead of filing.

catalysts.label: EpilepsyGTx first-in-human trial start (EPY201)
catalysts.detail: EpilepsyGTx plans to begin a first-in-human Phase 1/2a trial of EPY201 for focal refractory epilepsy in the UK/Europe using ClearPoint's SmartFlow Cannula and Navigation System, enrolling up to 30 adults.

catalysts.label: IRRAS integration synergies / reduced cash burn
catalysts.detail: Company guidance calls for cost synergies from the IRRAS acquisition to begin reducing cash burn in H2 2026, supporting the path to the $52-56 million full-year revenue target.

catalysts.label: CE Mark decisions for PRISM Laser Therapy systems
catalysts.detail: Both the 1.5T and 3.0T PRISM Laser Therapy systems have been submitted for CE Mark approval in Europe (application filed by partner Clinical Laserthermia Systems in December 2025), with a decision expected in the second half of 2026.

pulse: ClearPoint Neuro's story remains anchored to its partners' pipelines: uniQure's supportive June 17 FDA feedback on AMT-130 (delivered via ClearPoint's platform) drove a sharp CLPT rally and points to a Q3 2026 BLA filing, prompting B. Riley to lift its price target to $30 on June 18 while Stifel separately reiterated its Buy/$16 target on June 9 after the ASSFN neurosurgery meeting. The mid-July EpilepsyGTx delivery partnership and the late-May 10-year focused-ultrasound R&D deal with Sungkyunkwan University keep widening the drug-delivery ecosystem, alongside routine CEO 10b5-1 share sales (most recently June 29) that do not appear to signal a change in outlook. Fundamentals are improving in parallel, with Q1 2026 revenue up 43% to $12.1 million and full-year guidance of $52-56 million reaffirmed as IRRAS integration progresses; as of July 20, 2026 a broad news sweep found no incremental company-specific announcements since the July 14 EpilepsyGTx deal, so the next real checkpoints are ClearPoint's own Q2 2026 earnings (widely expected around August 11 per third-party estimates, but still not formally confirmed by the company) and further clarity on uniQure's BLA timeline and the H2 2026 CE Mark decisions for the PRISM laser systems.
